approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation-only continuation; DRIVE-CONTENT-001 builds the next bounded Drive content slice after EXTRACT-BACKFILL-001.
scopeSummary: Add bounded DOCX text extraction, prioritize newly-supported Office retry skips, prove explicit skip routing, and close through the existing governed Drive content lane without Drive permission mutation or broad Drive sweeps.
constraints: Foundation-only; do not start Value Builder split.
Use existing live sprint unless proof closeout explicitly updates Current Sprint truth.
Do not mutate Google Drive permissions.
Do not send request-access emails or external writes.
Do not run broad Drive sweeps outside the bounded daily quota target.

Approval-bound actions park the action, not the whole sprint; continue safe approved sprint work.
Each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main.
